---
title: "PTM_Site_Mapping"
author: "Swanitha"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r load}
setwd("/home/swanitha/psm_combined/")

samples <- c("Chrom_01","Chrom_02","Chrom_03","Chrom_04",
             "Sol_01","Sol_02","Sol_03","Sol_04")

all_psm <- map_dfr(samples, function(s) {
  read_tsv(paste0(s, "_psm.tsv"), show_col_types=FALSE) %>%
    mutate(Sample=s, Fraction=ifelse(grepl("Chrom",s),"Chromatin","Soluble"))
})

tf_genes <- c("EZHIP","FOSL2","KAT7","FOXK2","EZH2","BRD1","BRD2","BRD3",
              "KAT6A","KAT6B","CTCF","FOSL1","JUNB","RUNX2","GATAD1",
              "CTDSP1","SP3","SP110","MED12","MED28","STAT6","TP53BP1")

histone_genes <- c("H2BC13","H4C1","H1-1","H1-2","H1-4",
                   "H2BC11","H2BC12","H3C1","H3C2","H4")

tb <- function(df, cap) {
  df %>%
    kable(caption=cap) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                  full_width=FALSE, font_size=12) %>%
    row_spec(0, bold=TRUE, background="#222222", color="white")
}
```

## EZHIP — Complete Modification Profile
```{r ezhip}
ezhip_phospho <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene=="EZHIP", !is.na(`Observed Modifications`),
         grepl("Phospho|79.96|79.97",`Observed Modifications`),
         Probability>=0.90) %>%
  select(Sample, Fraction, Peptide, `Observed Modifications`,
         `Best Positions`, Probability) %>%
  arrange(desc(Probability))

ezhip_dimethyl <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene=="EZHIP", !is.na(`Observed Modifications`),
         grepl("28.03|[Dd]i.?[Mm]ethyl",`Observed Modifications`),
         Probability>=0.90) %>%
  select(Sample, Fraction, Peptide, `Observed Modifications`,
         `Best Positions`, Probability) %>%
  arrange(desc(Probability))

ezhip_complete <- bind_rows(
  ezhip_phospho %>% mutate(Modification_Type="Phosphorylation"),
  ezhip_dimethyl %>% mutate(Modification_Type="Arg Dimethylation")
) %>%
  select(Modification_Type, Sample, Fraction,
         Peptide, `Best Positions`, Probability) %>%
  arrange(Modification_Type, desc(Probability))

tb(ezhip_complete, "EZHIP — All modifications detected (phosphorylation + arginine dimethylation)")
```
## EZHIP — Site-Specific Modification Stoichiometry
```{r ezhip_stoich}
# S14 phosphorylation stoichiometry

ezhip_s14_stoich <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene == "EZHIP",
         `Protein Start` >= 128 & `Protein End` <= 146) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(
    total      = n(),
    modified   = sum(!is.na(`Observed Modifications`) &
                     grepl("Phospho|79.96|79.97",
                            `Observed Modifications`)),
    unmodified = total - modified,
    pct_phospho_S14 = round(modified / total * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Fraction, Sample)

# ── S10 phosphorylation stoichiometry ─────────────────────────
ezhip_s10_stoich <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene == "EZHIP",
         `Protein Start` >= 250 & `Protein End` <= 268) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(
    total      = n(),
    modified   = sum(!is.na(`Observed Modifications`) &
                     grepl("Phospho|79.96|79.97",
                            `Observed Modifications`)),
    unmodified = total - modified,
    pct_phospho_S10 = round(modified / total * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Fraction, Sample)

# ── R9 dimethylation stoichiometry ────────────────────────────
ezhip_r9_stoich <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene == "EZHIP",
         `Protein Start` >= 294 & `Protein End` <= 304) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(
    total      = n(),
    modified   = sum(!is.na(`Observed Modifications`) &
                     grepl("28.03|[Dd]i.?[Mm]ethyl",
                            `Observed Modifications`)),
    unmodified = total - modified,
    pct_dimethyl_R9 = round(modified / total * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Fraction, Sample)

tb(ezhip_s14_stoich, "EZHIP S14 — Phosphorylation stoichiometry per sample")
tb(ezhip_s10_stoich, "EZHIP S10 — Phosphorylation stoichiometry per sample")
tb(ezhip_r9_stoich,  "EZHIP R9 — Arginine dimethylation stoichiometry per sample")
```

## TF Proteins — Phosphorylation Sites
```{r phospho}
tf_phospho_summary <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene %in% tf_genes, !is.na(`Observed Modifications`),
         grepl("Phospho|79.96|79.97", `Observed Modifications`),
         Probability >= 0.90) %>%
  group_by(Gene, `Best Positions`, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(PSM_count       = n(),
            Max_Probability = round(max(Probability), 3),
            Replicates      = paste(sort(unique(Sample)), collapse=", "),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Gene, desc(PSM_count)) %>%
  mutate(n_positions = str_count(`Best Positions`, ";") + 1) %>%
  filter(n_positions <= 3 | is.na(`Best Positions`)) %>%
  select(-n_positions)

tb(tf_phospho_summary, "TF proteins — phosphorylation site summary (prob ≥ 0.90)")
```

## TF Proteins — Dimethylation Sites
```{r dimethyl}
tf_dimethyl_summary <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene %in% tf_genes, !is.na(`Observed Modifications`),
         grepl("28.03|[Dd]i.?[Mm]ethyl",`Observed Modifications`),
         Probability>=0.90) %>%
  group_by(Gene, `Best Positions`, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(PSM_count=n(),
            Max_Probability=round(max(Probability),3),
            Replicates=paste(sort(unique(Sample)),collapse=", "),
            .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(Gene, desc(PSM_count))

tb(tf_dimethyl_summary, "TF proteins — dimethylation site summary (prob ≥ 0.90)")
```

## TF Proteins — N-Terminal Acetylation
```{r nterm}
tf_nterm_summary <- all_psm %>%
  filter(Gene %in% tf_genes, !is.na(`Assigned Modifications`),
         grepl("N-term",`Assigned Modifications`),
         Probability>=0.90) %>%
  group_by(Gene, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(PSM_count=n(),
            Max_Probability=round(max(Probability),3),
            Replicates=paste(sort(unique(Sample)),collapse=", "),
            .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(Gene, Fraction)

tb(tf_nterm_summary, "TF proteins — N-terminal acetylation (housekeeping, co-translational)")
```

## Histone PTMs — Chromatin Fraction
```{r histones}
histone_mods <- all_psm %>%
  filter(grepl(paste(histone_genes,collapse="|"),Gene),
         !is.na(`Observed Modifications`),
         Probability>=0.90,
         !grepl("57.0214",`Assigned Modifications`)) %>%
  group_by(Gene, `Observed Modifications`, Fraction) %>%
  summarise(PSM_count=n(), .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(PSM_count)) %>%
  head(30)

tb(histone_mods, "Histone modifications — top 30 by PSM count")
```

## Global Modification Landscape — Chromatin Enriched
```{r global}
profile <- read_tsv("/home/swanitha/combined_experiment_profile.tsv",
                    show_col_types = FALSE)

chrom_enriched_mods <- profile %>%
  select(
    peak_apex      = `peak_apex...1`,
    PSMs           = `PSMs...4`,
    mapped_mass_1  = `mapped_mass_1...6`,
    mapped_mass_2  = `mapped_mass_2...7`,
    localized_PSMs = `localized_PSMs...8`,
    AA1            = `AA1...10`,
    AA1_enrichment_score = `AA1_enrichment_score...11`,
    Chrom_01_PSMs, Chrom_02_PSMs, Chrom_03_PSMs, Chrom_04_PSMs,
    Sol_01_PSMs,   Sol_02_PSMs,   Sol_03_PSMs,   Sol_04_PSMs
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_chrom       = (Chrom_01_PSMs + Chrom_02_PSMs +
                        Chrom_03_PSMs + Chrom_04_PSMs) / 4,
    mean_sol         = (Sol_01_PSMs   + Sol_02_PSMs   +
                        Sol_03_PSMs   + Sol_04_PSMs)   / 4,
    localisation_pct = round(localized_PSMs / PSMs * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  filter(PSMs >= 100,
         mean_chrom > mean_sol,
         !is.na(mapped_mass_1),
         !grepl("isotopic|Isotopic", mapped_mass_1)) %>%
  select(peak_apex, PSMs, mapped_mass_1, mapped_mass_2,
         localized_PSMs, localisation_pct,
         mean_chrom, mean_sol, AA1, AA1_enrichment_score) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_chrom)) %>%
  head(30) %>%
  setNames(c("Mass Shift", "Total PSMs", "Annotation", "Alt Annot",
             "Localised", "Localised %", "Mean Chrom", "Mean Sol",
             "Top Residue", "Enrichment"))

tb(chrom_enriched_mods,
   "Global chromatin-enriched modifications — top 30 (100+ PSMs, biological annotations only)")
```

```{r save, include=FALSE}
write_tsv(ezhip_complete,      "/home/swanitha/ezhip_complete_modifications.tsv")
write_tsv(ezhip_s14_stoich, "/home/swanitha/ezhip_s14_stoichiometry.tsv")
write_tsv(ezhip_s10_stoich, "/home/swanitha/ezhip_s10_stoichiometry.tsv")
write_tsv(ezhip_r9_stoich,  "/home/swanitha/ezhip_r9_stoichiometry.tsv")
write_tsv(tf_phospho_summary,  "/home/swanitha/tf_phospho_summary.tsv")
write_tsv(tf_dimethyl_summary, "/home/swanitha/tf_dimethyl_summary.tsv")
write_tsv(tf_nterm_summary,    "/home/swanitha/tf_nterm_acetyl_summary.tsv")
write_tsv(histone_mods,        "/home/swanitha/histone_modifications.tsv")
write_tsv(chrom_enriched_mods, "/home/swanitha/chromatin_enriched_mods.tsv")
```
